name: Dust Courier
short_description: Dust Courier is a text game with pixel graphics and resource management. Navigate the wasteland using the map and face unpredictable situations. Make choices and deliver the cargo safely.
detailed_description:
Conquer the wasteland Of the New World!

Description:

A text-based game with resource management elements set in a post-apocalyptic world. Your task is to plan a route and deliver cargo safely, all while participating in unique events with various outcomes.

About the Game:

Take on the role of a courier in a post-apocalyptic world. Your mission is to travel from one end of the country to the other, delivering cargo and encountering random events along the way. Strategically plan your route to arrive intact and deliver the cargo safely. The game offers:

  • 8 Maps Of Different Regions
  • 3 Types Of Transport With Unique Features
  • 54 random events with over 100 possible outcomes

The route you choose and the obstacles you face are entirely up to you. The key is in your hands, courier!

Show the wasteland What You Are Worth!
